title: Golden Globes 2026: Every Winner And Nominee In The Top Movie Categories
text: TVovermind provided comprehensive coverage of the 2026 Golden Globes winners and nominees in the top movie categories. The publication documented the Best Director category results, listing Paul Thomas Anderson as the winner for 'One Battle After Another' and providing details on all six nominees. The coverage included context about the film and director's trajectory throughout awards season. TVovermind's comprehensive list serves as a reference for understanding which films and directors achieved recognition at the ceremony across multiple categories.
